entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Bhavya_ValidationRule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE String PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <String><Attributes> <Map> <entry key="planResult"> <value> <ProvisioningResult status="committed"/> </value> </entry> <entry key="request"> <value> <AccountRequest application="JDBCProvisioning" nativeIdentity="Christina Ramos" op="Create" targetIntegration="JDBCProvisioning"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="provisioningTransactionId" value="0000003732"/> </Map> </Attributes> <AttributeRequest assignmentId="abda286fd3fa4d5aa6c20fcd1f491ed3" name="GroupName" op="Add" value="14"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment"> <value> <Boolean>true</Boolean> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest assignmentId="366c573dcf2a4a05a8fced3474bb6a38" name="GroupName" op="Add" value="15"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment"> <value> <Boolean>true</Boolean> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest assignmentId="e32634b3747d4d24951c96410ee380a2" name="GroupName" op="Add" value="16"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment"> <value> <Boolean>true</Boolean> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest assignmentId="31d1da5efe4846198ec5d06b064b6399" name="GroupName" op="Add" value="13"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment"> <value> <Boolean>true</Boolean> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <ProvisioningResult status="committed"/> </AccountRequest> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> </String>
